# FanFactors Corporate

FanFactors is a music social media gamified marketplace focused on legal listening, direct copyright-owner payment logic, artist-controlled pricing, and fan ownership.

## Primary Pages

- https://corporate.fanfactors.com/ - FanFactors corporate homepage and platform overview.
- https://corporate.fanfactors.com/how-it-works.html - How the FanFactors marketplace works.
- https://corporate.fanfactors.com/artists.html - Artist-facing platform story.
- https://corporate.fanfactors.com/fans.html - Fan-owner platform story.
- https://corporate.fanfactors.com/blog.html - Editorial hub for FanFactors content.
- https://corporate.fanfactors.com/faq.html - Direct answers about the product and mission.

## Core Positioning

FanFactors connects artists, copyright owners, and fans in a legal music marketplace where music interaction can become measurable value. The company narrative centers on taking music back, giving artists more control, and helping fans participate as music business owners.

## Content Themes

- direct-pay music
- legal music listening
- fan owners
- artist-set pricing
- FanScore
- invite-driven marketplace growth
- music-powered ownership
